## 🎯 Type of Contribution

- [ ] Adding new model(s)
- [ ] Adding new links/relationships
- [ ] Updating existing model information
- [ ] Fixing bugs or errors
- [ ] Improving documentation
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## 📋 Checklist

### For New Models:
- [ ] Added entry to `assets/data/nodes.json`
- [ ] Added at least one link in `assets/data/links.json`
- [ ] Verified model is peer-reviewed or widely cited (>500)
- [ ] Included paper URL (preferably open access)
- [ ] Included code repository (if available)
- [ ] All required fields are filled
- [ ] JSON syntax is valid (tested with validator)
- [ ] Tested locally (graph displays correctly)

### For All Contributions:
- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Followed naming conventions
- [ ] Descriptions are concise and accurate
- [ ] Links have correct relationship types
- [ ] No duplicate IDs or entries

## 🧪 Testing

**How did you test this change?**
- [ ] Ran local server and verified visually
- [ ] Validated JSON syntax
- [ ] Checked search functionality
- [ ] Verified filters work correctly

**Screenshots** (if applicable):
<!-- Add screenshots showing your model in the graph -->
